title: 2 Tier Dish Drainer Rack for Kitchen Counter - Space-Saving Dish Rack with Utensil Holder, Large Capacity Dish Drying Rack with Draining Board, Black
features: Large Capacity 2-Tier Design: This drying rack for kitchen counter take a detachable 2-tier design, easily accommodating various kitchen essentials. It comes with a utensil holder and cup rack, making it suitable for storing plates, bowls, mugs, and even pots and pans.

360° Rotating Drainage Spout: Equipped with an auto-draining drainboard, the rack includes a 360° rotating spout, ensuring water drains directly into the sink from any position, keeping your countertop dry and tidy.

Sturdy &Durable Design: Constructed with a robust metal frame, this rack offers strength and stability on your countertop. The rust-proof, corrosion-resistant material guarantees durability, ensuring it stays in top condition while protecting your kitchen surfaces from damage.
Easy Installation: No tools or screws are required for assembly. Simply follow the instructions in the installation manual to put the dish rack together with ease.

Versatile Storage Solution: This multifunctional dish rack not only holds your dishes and utensils but also includes a side cutlery rack and a cup holder, providing a comprehensive storage solution for your kitchenware.
